description_long: This trampoline features a circular design with a sturdy, dark-colored metal frame and four evenly spaced supporting legs. The upper perimeter is enclosed by a transparent safety net, held in place by the frame, providing protection for users. The jumping mat is also circular, dark in color, and appears to be tightly stretched across the frame, with a small central marking. Beneath the jumping surface, there is a lower circular platform or support ring, which adds structural stability. The overall construction suggests durability and safety for recreational use in urban parks or backyards. The minimalist design and use of dark materials give it a modern, unobtrusive appearance.
description: A round trampoline with a dark metal frame, transparent safety net, and a taut, dark jumping mat. It features four legs and a lower support ring for stability.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular frame, transparent net, and the central jumping mat with all four legs visible.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view, still highlighting the circular structure and net, with the legs and lower support ring visible.
description_view_2: Another rotated angle, maintaining visibility of the net, mat, and all four supporting legs.
description_view_3: Final view, similar to others, showing the round frame, net, and the arrangement of the legs and support ring.
attribute_jumping_mat: The jumping mat is circular, dark in color, and appears smooth and taut with a small central marking.
